blended.narrative: Jackson Hole is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 42°F.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
